title: Account Settings
subtitle: Manage your profile, email, and account

profile.heading: Profile
profile.error: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

email.heading: Email Address
email.verificationSent: Verification code sent to your new email address.
email.verificationPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your new email:

export.heading: Data Export
export.description: Under Quebec's Law 25, you have the right to receive a copy of all your personal data in a structured, machine-readable format.
export.error: Failed to export data. Please try again.

delete.title: Danger Zone
delete.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
delete.warning: This will permanently delete your account and all data across our systems. This action is irreversible.
delete.confirmLabel: Type the phrase below to confirm:
dataList: All audit logs associated with your account
delete.cannotUndo: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently erased.
